title: Senior Software Engineer - Zoho Corporation Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Zoho Corporation Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zoho Corporation Holdings Services:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation Holdings Services!
